email-updated.title: Your email address has been changed
email-updated.preview: Your email address has been updated
email-updated.heading: Your email address has been updated
email-updated.changedFromTo: The e-mail address for your {appName} account has been changed from {oldEmail} to {newEmail}.
email-updated.support: If you did not make this change, please contact our support team or <link>update your email address</link>.
email-updated.hint: This message is being sent to your old e-mail address only.

invoice-created.title: A new invoice has been created
invoice-created.heading: Your invoice is available
invoice-created.description: Thank you for your purchase at {appName}. Your invoice is available for download. Please find it in the attachments of this email.

login-link.title: Your {appName} Login Link
login-link.heading: Your Login Link
login-link.instructions: Please click the magic link below to sign in to your account.
login-link.copyAndPaste: or copy and paste this URL into your browser:

password-updated.title: Your password has been changed
password-updated.heading: Password has been changed
password-updated.description: The password for your {appName} account has been successfully changed.
password-updated.hint: If you did not make this change or you believe an unauthorised person has accessed your account, please contact us immediately to secure your account.

reset-password-link.title: Reset Password Link
reset-password-link.heading: Reset Password Link
reset-password-link.description: You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account at {appName}.
reset-password-link.instructions: Please click the button below to reset your password.
reset-password-link.copyAndPaste: or copy and paste this URL into your browser:

server-deleted.title: Your server has been deleted
server-deleted.heading: Your server has been deleted
server-deleted.description: Your server {serverName} and all data have been permanently deleted.
server-deleted.hint: Since your server was not renewed within the last {days} days, it has been deleted and cannot be restored.

server-extended.title: Your server has been renewed
server-extended.heading: Your server has been renewed
server-extended.description: Your server {serverName} has been successfully renewed.
server-extended.hint: The new expiration date is {newTerminatesAt}. If you need to extend the server again, you can do so in the customer portal.

server-ready.title: Your server is now ready
server-ready.heading: Your server is now ready
server-ready.description: The server you ordered is now fully configured and ready to use. For security reasons, the IP address is not included with this email. You can find it in the customer portal.

server-renewal-reminder.title: Your server is about to expire
server-renewal-reminder.preview: Your server is about to expire
server-renewal-reminder.heading: Your server is about to expire
server-renewal-reminder.description: Your server {serverName} is about to expire in the next {days} days.
server-renewal-reminder.hint: To avoid deletion, we recommend that you renew your server as soon as possible.

server-suspended.title: Your server has been suspended
server-suspended.heading: Your server has been suspended
server-suspended.description: Your server {serverName} has been suspended, because it was not renewed in time.
server-suspended.hint: You have {days} days to renew your server. After that, your server and all data will be permanently deleted.

verify-email.title: Your {appName} Verification Code
verify-email.heading: Please confirm your email address
verify-email.instructions: Enter this code on the {appName} verify page to complete your sign up:

footer.securityConcerns: If you were not expecting this email, you can ignore this email. If you are concerned about your account's safety, please <link>reach out to let us know</link>.
footer.dontWantToGetTheseEmails: Don't want to get these emails?
